checks.name: Read config/pipeline.yaml
checks.evidence: scripts/run_local_task.py loads workflows from config/pipeline.yaml and rejects unknown workflow names.

checks.name: Run fixed workflow with placeholder Agent
checks.evidence: PlaceholderAgent runs configured local_dev steps and writes one orchestration JSON artifact per step.

checks.name: Write task state
checks.evidence: workspace/tasks/dev-003/state.json records step, status, artifacts, errors and gates.

checks.name: Failure state
checks.evidence: tests/test_run_local_task.py covers a failing workflow step and verifies state.status == failed.

checks.name: Human quality gate
checks.evidence: Successful local runs stop at waiting_for_human_merge_approval with human_merge_approved == false.

non_blocking_notes: dev-004 should replace placeholder design-review behavior with a dedicated design reviewer Agent.
